features: 100% brand new and high quality material with long service life

220v-10-40ka-surge-protector.notes: Added GB18802.1 to standards. Added missing dimensions (72×90×65mm), shell material (fiber glass reinforced plastic), grounding resistance (≤4Ω), wire specs (live ≥6mm², earth ≥10mm²), protection mode (L-N/N-PE) to features and additionalSpecs.

applications: Lightning protection systems for AC power distribution
imax-40ka-230-400v.notes: Added missing applications including 'Lightning protection systems for AC power distribution'. Original site confirms features are complete. Applications were empty in current data.

applications: DC power supply lines (both solar array side and inverter/converter side)
Primary AC utility power supply protection
Underground or shielded connections between external PV arrays and control equipment
220v-lightning-protection-three-phase.notes: Added missing applications about solar PV / combiner box placement from original page. Added missing wire capacities (hard: 4-25mm², flexible: 4-16mm²), IP ratings (IP40 profile, IP20 connection port), stripping length, and torque specs.

applications: PV systems and solar power installations
DC lightning protection at multiple voltage levels (500V, 800V, 1000V)
ul-ce-spd.notes: Standards array was EMPTY - added UL and CE as confirmed on original page. Added applications from original site. Spec tables already present and complete in current data.

onboard-surge-protection-device.notes: Added applications from original page (Solar, Outdoor, Power Protection, Din Rail). Features already complete. Original page has minimal spec data beyond what is already captured. Standards remain empty as original site does not list specific standards beyond RoHS/REACH which are in features.

features: Advanced Circuit Interruption (ACI) technology - switch/spark gap combination integrated in protection module
No external backup fuse required due to ACI
Zero leakage current due to galvanic isolation
Energy coordination with Red/Line product family
Double protection of over-heat and over-current
surge-protective-modules.notes: Enhanced ACI feature description to explicitly include 'switch/spark gap combination' detail from original page. Added 200kA SCCR rating to features. Added applications that were empty.

features: Replacement module/core for surge protective devices
applications: Over voltage and over current protection systems
spd-modular.notes: Features and applications were both empty. Added features and applications from original page. Original page has minimal technical detail - no additional spec tables or standards found.

features: Low residual voltage and quick response
Metal oxide varistor components with high discharge capacity
Fault indication via red mark in inspection window
applications: Protect electric systems and on-loading electrical apparatus from thunder and instantaneous over-voltage

plug-in-spd-block.notes: Fixed categorySlug from 'accessories-for-spds' to 'protection-module' (product is under TMOV/protection modules on original site). Added missing features: low residual voltage, quick response, flame retardant shell. Added missing applications.

surge-replacement-module.notes: Standards was EMPTY - added UL and TUV as confirmed on original page. Added features and applications that were both empty.

plug-in-surge-arrester.notes: Added 'common and differential mode protection' and 'recommended placement at both ends of supply lines' to features as specified. Added applications that were empty.

features: Hot-swappable design - replacement without cutting off power supply
Powerful creepage discharge spark gap technology
Available for all discharge currents (40kA and 15kA) with optional condition indication
Keying system prevents wrong cartridge interchange (line vs neutral)
Tool-free replacement via module locking system
Green/red indicator flag for operational status
Live replacement capability - no need to de-energise
applications: Surge protective device module replacement across discharge ranges (10-20kA, 20-40kA, 30-60kA)
surge-protective-components.notes: Added 'hot-swappable' feature (described as 'replacement without cutting off power supply' on original). Added 'creepage discharge spark gap' technology to features. Enhanced existing features with more detail from original page. Added applications.

parts-surge-arrestor.notes: Standards only had CE. Added UL, TUV, ISO 9001:2018, IEC 61643-331:2017, GB 18802.331:2020 as confirmed on original page.

features: Two-pole surge arrester with plug-in module
Heavy-duty zinc oxide varistor/spark gap combination

features: Equipotential connection between device and SPD
customizable-spd-plastic.notes: Added GB 50054 and YD/T5098-1998 to standards. Added grounding wire diameter table from original page as additionalSpecs. Added features from original page.
